ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Completion Of The Transfer
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Text Ruling

Petition For Undue Influence, Fraud, Financial Elder Abuse, Probate Code 259, Lack Of Testamentary C
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for Ezra Roth, Lara Roth and Maura Roth.
Pamela Bowboski appeared by telephone for Laura Peterson (Trustee).

The Court stated that it appears that the grounds for transfer are well stated. Mr. Lowe stated that his Client will pay the transfer fees. The Court granted the Petition to Transfer to San Mateo County (subject to review of the order). Status on completion of the transfer is set for March 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
